title: Journey Mode
description:
Immersive yourself in breath-taking landscapes and vibrant wildlife of Journey Mode. Explore the vast terrains and encounter a diverse array of creatures.

Originally from my YouTube series Minecraft: Journey Mode.
body:
![JM Border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/571863984f8a7a8e2cd804ad48488ca3e39144a6.png)
**Journey Mode** offers you **immersive** and **breathtaking** landscapes with **vibrant wildlife**. Explore the vast terrains enhanced by mods like **Tectonic** and **Terralith**. Encounter a diverse array of creatures with mods like **Wildlife**, **Naturalist**, and **Hybrid Aquatic** adding a touch of realism to your adventures as you capture the beauty of Minecraft through your lens.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VnKZT10QQYk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

_This Modpack was highly requested from my YouTube series Minecraft: Journey Mode. My goal is to travel as far as possible while documenting the Journey with my trusty camera._
![JM Border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca4501fe1e581cbae47b249a89663e55058b32ed.png)
